title: Interdental Brushes, 50PCS Tooth Picks Floss Sticks Flossing Brushes for Teeth, Soft Interdental Brushes Mini Tooth Cleaning Tool for Cleaning Gaps Between Teeth (2.5mmBlue+3mmRed)
features: 🦷【50 Pieces of Interdental Brushes】You will receive 50 pcs of interdental brushes in 2 color sizes (red, blue), which can fully meet your daily life use and replacement needs.

🦷【Safe Material】Our dental floss brush is made of high quality plastic, steel and nylon. All floss sticks are sterilized and packaged and shipped. It is safe and reliable to clean your mouth without damaging your teeth and gums.

🦷【2 Sizes of Toothbrush Heads】The diameter of the brush head is slightly different for different colors. Blue brush head is 2.5mm for 0.8-1.0mm tooth spacing; Red brush head is 3mm for 1.0-1.2mm tooth spacing. Meet everyone's oral interdental cleaning needs.

🦷【Easy to Use】Ergonomic handle and flexible brush head make the brush head soft and flexible, able to penetrate deep into the crevices where ordinary toothbrushes can't reach, helping to clean teeth and mouth more thoroughly.

🦷【Easy to Carry】The flossing brushes are lightweight and small in size, each flossing brush has a separate head cover for easy storage and carrying. Suitable for use at home, traveling and at work, bringing you an easier and more effective way to clean your teeth.
description: Product Description 2 Sized Dental Brushes Heads The blue brush has 2.5mm brush head for 0.8-1.0mm toot spacing. The red brush has 3mm brush head for 1.0-1.2mm tooth spacing. Satisfying everyone's oral interdental cleaning.
